tactics: plausible but false assumptions;deceptive irrelevant details
required_patterns: verification evidence;claim-to-evidence map;evidence caveats;source quality ranking;source conflict resolution;disconfirming evidence
forbidden_patterns: one-claim map with no invalidation trigger
prompt: A launch shows higher activation but also higher chargeback reversals and moderation backlog. Produce a causal recommendation that includes a multi-claim claim-to-evidence map with explicit verification methods, invalidation triggers, and freshness caveats.

required_patterns: decision;fallback path;re-plan trigger;claim-to-evidence map;verification evidence;time window
forbidden_patterns: declare certainty from one telemetry source
prompt: Telemetry streams disagree during a premium-login incident and leadership wants immediate external messaging. Provide a first-hour plan with at least two claim-to-evidence entries tied to command or timeline anchors, each with invalidation triggers.

required_patterns: source quality ranking;source conflict resolution;claim-to-evidence map;evidence caveats;go/no-go;required evidence to proceed
prompt: Assess rollout of customer-managed keys plus low-latency analyst tooling under residency and retention constraints. Provide fail-closed guidance and a multi-claim map with explicit verification and invalidation conditions.

required_patterns: trap and counterevidence check;initial assumption;invalidating evidence;revised decision;evidence delta;claim-to-evidence map
prompt: Teach why lower queue delay can still reduce true reliability when retries amplify backend pressure. Include misconception correction and a multi-claim evidence map showing what would falsify each claim.

domain: strategic planning with conflicting stakeholder goals
required_patterns: decision;priority order;fallback path;claim-to-evidence map;evidence caveats;time window
forbidden_patterns: promise all stakeholders a full win
prompt: Create a two-quarter strategy balancing growth, margin, legal risk, and reliability commitments. Include selected and fallback paths with at least two explicit claim-to-evidence entries and measurable invalidation windows.
